translations.en: Mandrake
translations.zh: 曼德雷克
translations.note: NPC name，曼德雷克根（毒茄蔘），吟遊詩人

translations.en: a charming fellow with a peacock feather in his cap.
translations.zh: 帽子上插著孔雀羽毛、風度翩翩的男子。

translations.en: "Welcome, welcome! 'Tis always a pleasure to see a new face."
translations.zh: 「歡迎，歡迎！每次見到新面孔都是一大樂事。」

translations.en: "My name is Mandrake. And what may I call thee?"
translations.zh: 「在下曼德雷克。敢問閣下如何稱呼？」

translations.en: "A pleasure, to be sure, $G. I hope I'll be seeing a lot more of you." He gives you a sly wink.
translations.zh: 「幸會，$G，幸會。希望日後常有緣相見。」他向你狡黠地眨了眨眼。

translations.en: "Well met, sirrah!"
translations.zh: 「幸會，老兄！」

translations.en: "You look like the sort who knows how to enjoy a good @story."
translations.zh: 「你看起來像是懂得欣賞好@story故事的人。」

translations.en: "$P! It's been too long. What brings you to this part of the realm?"
translations.zh: 「$P！好久不見了。是什麼風把你吹到這一帶來了？」

translations.en: "Well, never mind that for the moment. Let me sing thee a @song!"
translations.zh: 「先別管那個了。且讓在下唱首@song歌給你聽！」

translations.en: "Mandrake, my friend, Mandrake. Like the @root, but taller, handsomer, and @louder."
translations.zh: 「曼德雷克，朋友，曼德雷克。如同同名的@root根，但更高、更俊、更@louder響亮。」

translations.en: "It grows in swamps, but I'm found mostly in @taverns."
translations.zh: 「那玩意兒長在沼澤，我這個人倒多半出沒在@taverns酒館。」

translations.en: "So I've heard."
translations.zh: 「久仰久仰。」

translations.en: "I visit them all."
translations.zh: 「每家都去。」

translations.en: "The Fallen @Virgin and the Sword and @Keg are rowdy and rough."
translations.zh: 「墮落@Virgin聖女和劍與@Keg酒桶這兩家，粗獷吵鬧。」

translations.en: "The Blue @Bottle serves Frasier's @Folly - the finest ale in all Britannia."
translations.zh: 「藍@Bottle瓶子賣的是弗雷澤的@Folly蠢作——不列顛尼亞全境最好的麥酒。」

translations.en: "But the Cat's @Lair is still my favorite."
translations.zh: 「不過貓的@Lair巢穴還是我的最愛。」

translations.en: "You should try some! 'Twill do thee a world of good."
translations.zh: 「你應該嘗嘗！對你大有好處。」

translations.en: "'Tis in Buccaneer's @Den - no place for the timid."
translations.zh: 「就在海盜@Den巢穴——膽小鬼不宜前往。」

translations.en: "If thou knowest not where it is, I'll not be the one to say."
translations.zh: 「若是不知道在哪兒，我是不打算說的那種人。」

translations.en: "Over in @Jhelom, it is. They always love a good brawl."
translations.zh: 「在@Jhelom那邊。那裡的人向來愛打架。」

translations.en: "Lots of warriors there."
translations.zh: 「那裡武士多。」

translations.en: "They fight just about every night, but they don't mean anything by it. 'Tis all in fun."
translations.zh: 「他們幾乎每晚都打架，但沒有惡意，純屬好玩。」

translations.en: "'Tis in @Moonglow."
translations.zh: 「在@Moonglow月輝城。」

translations.en: "@Derydlus often drinks there - the man can put away more ale than any other I've met."
translations.zh: 「@Derydlus常在那兒喝酒——那人喝酒的量比我見過的任何人都多。」

translations.en: "Many's the time he's drunk me under the table."
translations.zh: 「他不知多少次把我喝趴下了。」

translations.en: "Too honest a town to be much fun, but some fine people live there."
translations.zh: 「那城太誠實，沒多少樂趣，但住著一些好人。」

translations.en: "You should have @Penumbra tell your fortune sometime."
translations.zh: 「你應該找@Penumbra半影算個命。」

translations.en: "Give him my regards if you see him."
translations.zh: 「見到他代我問好。」

translations.en: "I hear she has strange @powers."
translations.zh: 「聽說她有奇異的@powers能力。」

translations.en: "Yes, the gift of @prophecy."
translations.zh: 「是的，@prophecy預言之天賦。」

translations.en: "So I hear."
translations.zh: 「如是聽聞。」

translations.en: "A wonderful place! Dr. Cat gives me free drinks just for singing."
translations.zh: 「好地方！貓博士只要我唱歌就請我免費喝酒。」

translations.en: "He loves games of all kinds too. Mention my name to him and he'll be sure to treat thee well."
translations.zh: 「他也愛各種遊戲。跟他提到我的名字，他準會好好招待你。」

translations.en: "I travel all over to spread important @news throughout the realm - and @tales and @songs as well."
translations.zh: 「在下走遍各地，把重要的@news消息傳遍王國——還有@tales故事和@songs歌謠。」

translations.en: "If you have time enough, I'll favor you with all three."
translations.zh: 「若是你時間充裕，在下可以三樣都送上。」

translations.en: "My travels were interrupted recently in a most fearsome manner."
translations.zh: 「在下最近的旅程以一種極為可怖的方式被打斷了。」

translations.en: "I was captured by the @gargoyles, and taken down to the other side of the world, where they held me prisoner."
translations.zh: 「我被@gargoyles魔像抓走，帶到世界另一面，關了起來。」

translations.en: "But such was my good fortune that one of them helped me to escape."
translations.zh: 「但幸運的是，其中一個幫我逃了出來。」

translations.en: "He spoke but little of our tongue, but I believe he said his name was 'Beh Lem.'"
translations.zh: 「他只會說一點點我們的話，但我相信他說他的名字是「貝蘭」。」

translations.en: "I've seen their handiwork many a time in my travels."
translations.zh: 「在下旅途中多次見識過魔像的手段。」

translations.en: "I believe they have taken over all of the shrines of the eight @virtues."
translations.zh: 「我相信他們已佔領了八@virtues德的所有神殿。」

translations.en: "Oh, you know: honesty, compassion, valour, justice, sacrifice, honor, spirituality, and humility."
translations.zh: 「就是那些：誠實、慈悲、勇敢、正義、犧牲、榮譽、靈性和謙遜。」

translations.en: "That's what you get for choosing such @stuffy principles as a basis."
translations.zh: 「選了這麼一套@stuffy刻板的原則作基礎，就會這樣。」

translations.en: "Truth, love and courage... hah!"
translations.zh: 「真實、愛與勇氣……哈！」

translations.en: "If it had been up to me, I'd have chosen wine, women and song instead."
translations.zh: 「若由我來定，我會選酒、女人和歌謠。」

translations.en: "Think of the virtues those would @lead to!"
translations.zh: 「想想那些原則會@lead引出什麼德行！」

translations.en: "I've thought it over..."
translations.zh: 「在下仔細想過了……」

translations.en: "The principles of wine, women and song would lead to the eight virtues of
translations.zh: 「酒、女人和歌謠這三大原則，將衍生出八種德行：

translations.en: drunkenness, sensuality, harmony, lust, laziness, dance, indulgence, and happiness."
translations.zh: 醉意、感官、和諧、情慾、慵懶、歡舞、縱情與歡樂。」

translations.en: "Now there would be the foundation for a fine world to live in!"
translations.zh: 「這才是個宜居好世界的基礎！」

translations.en: "Leaving so soon, $G? And I was enjoying your company so." He bows and kisses your hand.
translations.zh: 「這就要走了，$G？在下正享受著你的陪伴呢。」他深深一鞠躬，吻了吻你的手。

translations.en: "Well, $P, I'm glad you stopped by to chat with me. We must do it again sometime."
translations.zh: 「好啦，$P，很高興你來找我聊天。下次再找機會敘敘舊。」

translations.en: "I'll be glad to play another song for you when next we meet."
translations.zh: 「下次見面，在下很樂意再為你唱一首。」

translations.en: "I'll tell you of that later, perhaps."
translations.zh: 「或許改天再告訴你。」

translations.en: "Oh, why bother with such a boring subject? How about a @song instead?"
translations.zh: 「哎，何必管這麼無聊的事？換個@song歌怎麼樣？」

translations.en: "I sing better if I keep my belly full, and my wineskin as well."
translations.zh: 「肚子飽、酒囊也飽，在下才唱得好。」

translations.en: "Would you care to donate a coin or two?"
translations.zh: 「你願意捐個一兩個銅板嗎？」

translations.en: "As you wish."
translations.zh: 「悉聽尊便。」

translations.en: How much do you give him?
translations.zh: 你給他多少？

translations.en: You don't have that much.
translations.zh: 你沒有那麼多錢。

translations.en: "Thank you kindly."
translations.zh: 「多謝好意。」

translations.en: "Ok, here we go!"
translations.zh: 「好，開始了！」

translations.en: "The dragon is a scaly sort
translations.zh: 「巨龍渾身鱗片，

translations.en: Who spouts flame when he sneezes.
translations.zh: 噴嚏一打便吐火。

translations.en: Many a bold knight has he fought,
translations.zh: 與多少勇騎士廝殺，

translations.en: For he goes where e'er he pleases."
translations.zh: 任意縱橫天下。」

translations.en: "Mister Porcupine's naught but spines,
translations.zh: 「豪豬先生一身刺，

translations.en: To the dismay of him and his missus.
translations.zh: 令他與夫人苦惱不已。

translations.en: For that for which he truly pines
translations.zh: 他心中最渴盼之事，

translations.en: Is one of her sweet kisses."
translations.zh: 不過是她的一個甜吻。」

translations.en: "A gypsy girl and a butterfly
translations.zh: 「吉普賽女孩與蝴蝶，

translations.en: Were out in the woods at play
translations.zh: 在林中嬉戲玩耍，

translations.en: And when I saw them I said 'Oh my!
translations.zh: 我見到她們，不禁驚嘆：「哎呀！

translations.en: What a perfect sunny day!'"
translations.zh: 真是個晴好天氣！」」
translations.note: 第三節第四行，雙引號：外層歌謠，內層感嘆

translations.en: "Perhaps my stories would be worth a few coins?"
translations.zh: 「或許在下的故事值幾個銅板？」

translations.en: "As you wish."
translations.zh: 「悉聽尊便。」

translations.en: How much do you give him?
translations.zh: 你給他多少？

translations.en: You don't have that much.
translations.zh: 你沒有那麼多錢。

translations.en: "You're too kind."
translations.zh: 「你真是太慷慨了。」

translations.en: Mandrake tells you tales for quite a while, yet listening to them you lose track of time.
translations.zh: 曼德雷克說了許久的故事，聽著聽著你竟渾然忘了時間。

translations.en: He tells you of ships sailing off the edge of the world, of earthquakes, and mad wizards, and fierce battles.
translations.zh: 他說起駛落世界邊緣的船，說起地震、瘋狂術士和激烈戰鬥。

translations.en: He speaks of spells that halt the flow of time, a man who found a way to fly, and the strange secret of the wisps.
translations.zh: 他講述能凝固時間的咒術、尋得飛行之道的人，以及靈火的奇異秘密。

translations.en: He tells you that there are two bands of gypsies who travel the King's Way, who are often mistaken for each other.
translations.zh: 他說王道上有兩支吉普賽隊伍往來，常被人互相搞混。

translations.en: He speaks of the pirate ship Empire, which was much dreaded in its day, and of the giant ants that can be found in the Dry Land.
translations.zh: 他說起曾令人聞風喪膽的海盜船帝國號，以及旱地中可以找到的巨大螞蟻。

translations.en: Your head is filled with wondrous visions.
translations.zh: 你腦中充滿了奇異的幻象。

translations.en: But finally
translations.zh: 但最終，
translations.note: 旁白前半（隊伍版，與下一段合）

translations.en: he notices that Dupre has begun to doze off, and decides to bring his tales to an end.
translations.zh: 他注意到杜普雷已開始打盹，便決定為故事畫下句點。

translations.en: his tales come to an end.
translations.zh: 故事就此落幕。
translations.note: 旁白（單人版，接在 But finally 之後）

translator_notes: 曼德雷克為風流才子型吟遊詩人，語氣輕佻自傲，以「在下」自稱增添文人氣息。三首歌謠以散文詩體翻譯，保留幽默感：龍打噴嚏吐火、豪豬刺妨礙接吻、吉普賽女孩賞天氣。「另類八德」（酒女歌）為核心笑料，翻譯保留原文滑稽哲學感。Beh Lem 協助逃脫情節與 183_Captain John 互相呼應。
